The plant has been traditionally used in Australian folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and skin problems, due to its purported health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Acacia tenuispica include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and condensed tannins, which have been shown to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties.
